Test Case Description: Create MAIN_IN Gate Pass – All Required Fields Valid
Scenario: Happy Path – Vehicle arriving at service centre for repair/service
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN
Pre-conditions: User is logged in as Initiator. Location master data (DIMO locations) loaded. Vehicle master exists.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Create Gate Pass
2. Select Service / Repair tab
3. Select Gate IN mode
4. Enter Vehicle Registration Number
5. Select Chassis No from lookup
6. Select Make from dropdown
7. Select Vehicle Colour
8. Select Receiving Location (DIMO plant)
9. Select Service Job Type(s) (e.g. Repair)
10. Enter Arrival Date and Time
11. Enter Customer Name (optional)
12. Click Submit
Test Data: Vehicle: WP CAB-1234 | Chassis: HMA41CA3BNE123456 | Make: TATA | Colour: White | Location: Colombo TATA - Altair Showroom | Job: Repair | Arrival: 2026-04-02 09:00
Expected Result: Gate pass created with status APPROVED. GP number generated (e.g. GP-0220). Initiator sees pass in My Gate Passes under Service/Repair tab. Security Officer at fromLocation receives notification to confirm Gate IN.
Comments: MAIN_IN is auto-approved – no approver step needed. fromLocation is auto-set to initiator's defaultLocation.

Test Case Description: Create MAIN_IN – Vehicle Registration Missing
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN
Pre-conditions: User logged in as Initiator.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN
2. Leave Vehicle Registration field empty
3. Fill all other required fields
4. Click Submit
Expected Result: Form does not submit. Inline validation error displayed: "Vehicle registration is required". Field highlighted in red.

Test Case Description: Create MAIN_IN – Chassis Number Missing
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN
Pre-conditions: User logged in as Initiator.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN
2. Leave Chassis No field blank
3. Fill all other required fields
4. Click Submit
Expected Result: Form does not submit. Validation error: "Chassis number is required".

Test Case Description: Create MAIN_IN – Arrival Date in the Past
Scenario: Field Validation – Past date not allowed
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN
Pre-conditions: User logged in as Initiator.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN
2. Fill all required fields
3. Set Arrival Date to yesterday's date
4. Click Submit
Expected Result: Form does not submit. Validation error: "Arrival date cannot be in the past".

Test Case Description: Create MAIN_IN – No Service Job Type Selected
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN
Pre-conditions: User logged in as Initiator.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN
2. Fill all required fields except Service Job Type
3. Click Submit
Expected Result: Form does not submit. Validation error indicating at least one job type must be selected.

Test Case Description: Create MAIN_IN – Verify Auto-Approval Status
Scenario: System Behaviour – MAIN_IN skips approval workflow
Screen: My Gate Passes > Service/Repair
Pre-conditions: MAIN_IN gate pass successfully created.
Test Steps:
1. Create a valid MAIN_IN gate pass
2. Navigate to My Gate Passes
3. Select Service/Repair filter
4. Locate the newly created pass
Expected Result: Pass status is APPROVED immediately after creation. No pending approval state shown.
Comments: MAIN_IN / SUB_OUT / SUB_IN auto-approved by system design.

Test Case Description: Security Gate IN – Confirm MAIN_IN Vehicle Arrival
Scenario: Happy Path – Security Officer confirms vehicle at gate
Screen: Gate IN / OUT > Gate IN Panel
Pre-conditions: Security Officer logged in at the correct plant location. MAIN_IN pass in APPROVED status exists for this location.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Security Officer (e.g. Security One – Colombo TATA)
2. Navigate to Gate IN / OUT page
3. Locate the MAIN_IN pass in Gate IN queue
4. Verify vehicle details (number plate, chassis, colour)
5. Slide the slider to confirm Gate IN
Test Data: GP: MAIN_IN APPROVED | Vehicle: WP CAB-1234 | fromLocation: Colombo TATA - Altair Showroom
Expected Result: Pass status changes to COMPLETED. Pass removed from Gate IN queue. Initiator receives notification: "Vehicle Arrived – Security Confirmed Gate IN".
Comments: Security Officer must be at the same plant as the pass fromLocation.

Test Case Description: Security Gate IN – MAIN_IN Not Visible to Wrong Location Security
Screen: Gate IN / OUT > Gate IN Panel
Pre-conditions: Security Officer logged in at a DIFFERENT plant (e.g. Kandy Branch). MAIN_IN pass exists for Colombo TATA.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Security Two (Kandy Branch)
2. Navigate to Gate IN / OUT page
3. Check Gate IN queue
Test Data: MAIN_IN pass fromLocation: Colombo TATA - Altair Showroom
Expected Result: MAIN_IN pass does NOT appear in Security Two's Gate IN queue. Queue scoped to Kandy Branch only.

Test Case Description: Security Gate IN – Notification Sent to Initiator on Confirmation
Screen: My Gate Passes / Notification Bell
Pre-conditions: MAIN_IN in APPROVED status. Initiator logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Security Officer confirms Gate IN for a MAIN_IN pass
2. Switch to Initiator session
3. Check notification bell
4. Check My Gate Passes status
Expected Result: Notification appears in Initiator's bell: "Vehicle Arrived – Security Confirmed Gate IN". My Gate Passes shows pass as COMPLETED.

Test Case Description: Create SUB_OUT – Vehicle Moving to Sub-Location
Scenario: Happy Path – Vehicle sent from service plant to sub-location
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate OUT > Sub Gate OUT
Pre-conditions: Initiator logged in. Parent MAIN_IN gate pass exists and is COMPLETED. Vehicle is physically at the service plant.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Initiator
2. Navigate to Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate OUT
3. Select Sub Gate OUT sub-type
4. Enter or scan the parent MAIN_IN GP number
5. Verify vehicle details auto-populated from parent pass
6. Verify From Location auto-filled (vehicle's current location)
7. Select To Location (destination sub-plant)
8. Enter Departure Date and Time
9. Add transport/carrier details
10. Click Submit
Test Data: Parent GP: MAIN_IN pass | From: Colombo TATA - Altair Showroom | To: Kandy Branch - Vehicle Park-1 | Departure: 2026-04-02 10:00
Expected Result: SUB_OUT gate pass created with status APPROVED. Uses same GP number as parent MAIN_IN. Source Security Officer (Colombo) receives notification to confirm Gate OUT.
Comments: SUB_OUT auto-approved. fromLocation must exactly match source Security Officer's defaultLocation for them to see it in Gate OUT queue.

Test Case Description: Create SUB_OUT – Parent GP Number Not Found
Scenario: Field Validation – Invalid GP number entered
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate OUT > Sub Gate OUT
Pre-conditions: Initiator logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate OUT
2. Select Sub Gate OUT
3. Enter a GP number that does not exist (e.g. GP-9999)
4. Click search/find
Expected Result: Error shown: pass not found. Vehicle details do not auto-populate. Submit button remains disabled until a valid pass is found.

Test Case Description: Create SUB_OUT – To Location Not Selected
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate OUT > Sub Gate OUT
Pre-conditions: Initiator logged in. Valid parent MAIN_IN pass found.
Test Steps:
1. Find valid parent MAIN_IN pass
2. Leave To Location blank
3. Fill all other fields
4. Click Submit
Expected Result: Form validation error: "Destination location is required".

Test Case Description: Create SUB_OUT – Verify GP Number Consistency
Scenario: System Behaviour – SUB_OUT displays parent GP number
Screen: My Gate Passes > Service/Repair (expanded journey)
Pre-conditions: SUB_OUT pass successfully created.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to My Gate Passes > Service/Repair tab
2. Find the parent MAIN_IN vehicle card
3. Expand journey details
4. View SUB_OUT step
Expected Result: SUB_OUT step in the journey timeline shows the parent GP number (GP-0214), NOT a separate sub-pass number. Journey progress updates: In Transit → Kandy Branch.
Comments: User requirement: all sub-passes share the parent GP number in the UI.

Test Case Description: Source Security Gate OUT – SUB_OUT Appears in Gate OUT Queue
Scenario: Happy Path – Source Security sees SUB_OUT ready to release
Screen: Gate IN / OUT > Gate OUT Panel
Pre-conditions: Source Security Officer (Colombo TATA) logged in. SUB_OUT pass in APPROVED or INITIATOR_OUT status exists with fromLocation = Colombo TATA.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Security One (Colombo TATA - Altair Showroom)
2. Navigate to Gate IN / OUT page
3. Check Gate OUT queue
4. Locate SUB_OUT pass
Test Data: SUB_OUT pass | fromLocation: Colombo TATA - Altair Showroom | status: APPROVED
Expected Result: SUB_OUT pass appears in Source Security's Gate OUT queue. Card shows vehicle number, GP number (parent), route (From → To), pass sub-type: SUB OUT.

Test Case Description: Source Security Gate OUT – Confirm Gate OUT by Sliding
Scenario: Happy Path – Security slides to confirm departure
Screen: Gate IN / OUT > Gate OUT Panel
Pre-conditions: SUB_OUT in Source Security's Gate OUT queue.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Security One
2. Locate SUB_OUT pass in Gate OUT queue
3. Verify vehicle details on card
4. Slide the slider fully to confirm Gate OUT
Test Data: Vehicle: 2427 | GP: GP-0214 | Route: Colombo → Kandy
Expected Result: Status changes to GATE_OUT. Pass removed from Source Security's Gate OUT queue. Destination Security (Kandy) receives notification. Destination Initiator (Kandy) receives notification in Vehicle Arrivals.

Test Case Description: Source Security Gate OUT – Wrong Location Security Cannot See SUB_OUT
Screen: Gate IN / OUT > Gate OUT Panel
Pre-conditions: Security Two (Kandy) logged in. SUB_OUT fromLocation = Colombo TATA.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Security Two (Kandy Branch)
2. Navigate to Gate IN / OUT
3. Check Gate OUT queue
Test Data: SUB_OUT fromLocation: Colombo TATA - Altair Showroom
Expected Result: SUB_OUT does NOT appear in Security Two's Gate OUT queue. Scoped correctly to source location only.

Test Case Description: Destination Security Gate IN – SUB_OUT Appears After Source Confirms Gate OUT
Scenario: Happy Path – Destination SO sees incoming vehicle
Screen: Gate IN / OUT > Gate IN Panel
Pre-conditions: Source Security has confirmed Gate OUT (status = GATE_OUT). Destination Security (Kandy) logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Source Security confirms Gate OUT for SUB_OUT
2. Login as Security Two (Kandy Branch - Vehicle Park-1)
3. Navigate to Gate IN / OUT page
4. Check Gate IN queue (within 8 seconds of notification or manual refresh)
Test Data: SUB_OUT status: GATE_OUT | toLocation: Kandy Branch - Vehicle Park-1
Expected Result: SUB_OUT appears in Destination Security's Gate IN queue. Card shows route (Colombo → Kandy), vehicle number, GP number (parent), sub-type: SUB OUT.
Comments: This is the core bug being fixed. Server now filters by toLocation to ensure correct scoping.

Test Case Description: Destination Security Gate IN – Confirm Vehicle Arrival by Sliding
Scenario: Happy Path – Security slides to confirm arrival
Screen: Gate IN / OUT > Gate IN Panel
Pre-conditions: SUB_OUT in GATE_OUT status visible in Destination Security's Gate IN queue.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Security Two (Kandy Branch)
2. Locate SUB_OUT pass in Gate IN queue
3. Verify vehicle details
4. Slide the slider to confirm Gate IN
Expected Result: Status changes to COMPLETED. Pass removed from Gate IN queue. Source Initiator receives notification in My Gate Passes. Destination Initiator (Kandy) receive arrival notification. Vehicle Arrivals page for Kandy moves pass to Recently Confirmed.

Test Case Description: Destination Initiator – Vehicle Arrivals Auto-Updates After Security Gate IN
Screen: Vehicle Arrivals (receive page)
Pre-conditions: Destination Initiator (Initiator Two – Kandy) logged in and on Vehicle Arrivals page. Destination Security has just confirmed Gate IN.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Initiator Two (Kandy Branch)
2. Open Vehicle Arrivals page
3. Wait up to 10 seconds (notification poll) OR click Refresh
Test Data: SUB_OUT just confirmed as GATE_OUT by source SO
Expected Result: Vehicle card auto-moves from Pending Arrivals tab to Recently Confirmed tab. Badge shows "Security Gate IN ✓". No manual confirm button shown for AFTER_SALES SUB_OUT.

Test Case Description: Source Initiator – My Gate Passes Status Updates After Destination Gate IN
Screen: My Gate Passes > Service/Repair journey card
Pre-conditions: Source Initiator (Initiator One – Colombo) logged in. Destination Security just confirmed Gate IN.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Initiator One
2. Navigate to My Gate Passes > Service/Repair tab
3. Expand journey card for the relevant vehicle
4. Wait up to 10 seconds (notification poll) OR click Refresh
Expected Result: Journey step for SUB_OUT shows status COMPLETED with label "Security confirmed Gate IN at sub-location". Current Location on the card updates to the sub-location (Kandy Branch - Vehicle Park-1).

Test Case Description: Destination Security Gate IN – SUB_OUT Not Visible Until Source Confirms Gate OUT
Screen: Gate IN / OUT > Gate IN Panel
Pre-conditions: Destination Security Two logged in. SUB_OUT status = APPROVED or INITIATOR_OUT (source SO has NOT yet confirmed Gate OUT).
Test Steps:
1. Initiator creates SUB_OUT (status: APPROVED or INITIATOR_OUT)
2. Login as Security Two (Kandy)
3. Check Gate IN queue immediately
Expected Result: SUB_OUT does NOT appear in Destination Security's Gate IN queue. It only appears after status is GATE_OUT (source SO confirmed departure).
Comments: Prevents premature Gate IN confirmation before vehicle has physically left source.

Test Case Description: Create MAIN_OUT – Final Vehicle Departure from Service Centre
Scenario: Happy Path – Vehicle leaving after service completion
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate OUT > Main Gate OUT
Pre-conditions: Initiator logged in. All SUB_OUT/SUB_IN cycles completed. Vehicle is back at service plant.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Initiator / Service Advisor
2. Navigate to Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate OUT
3. Select Main Gate OUT sub-type
4. Enter parent MAIN_IN GP number
5. Verify vehicle details auto-filled
6. Select Approver (if credit payment orders exist)
7. Enter Departure Date / Time
8. Add transport details
9. Click Submit
Test Data: Parent GP: MAIN_IN pass | Departure: 2026-04-02 14:00 | Payment: Mixed (Immediate + Credit)
Expected Result: MAIN_OUT created. Status routes to CASHIER_REVIEW. Cashier receives notification to review payment orders.
Comments: MAIN_OUT goes to CASHIER_REVIEW first (not APPROVED) so cashier can verify SAP payment orders.

Test Case Description: Create MAIN_OUT – Routes to CASHIER_REVIEW (Not Direct Approval)
Screen: My Gate Passes / Cashier Review screen
Pre-conditions: MAIN_OUT just created.
Test Steps:
1. Create MAIN_OUT pass
2. Check status in My Gate Passes
3. Check Cashier Review page (login as Cashier)
Expected Result: Status is CASHIER_REVIEW (not APPROVED). Cashier sees the pass in their review queue.

Test Case Description: Cashier Clears Immediate Payment – MAIN_OUT with No Credit Orders
Scenario: Happy Path – Cashier clears cash/immediate payment only
Screen: Cashier Review screen
Pre-conditions: Cashier logged in. MAIN_OUT in CASHIER_REVIEW status. Pass has only immediate payment orders (no credit).
Test Steps:
1. Login as Cashier
2. Navigate to Cashier Review
3. Locate MAIN_OUT pass
4. Verify SAP payment orders listed
5. Confirm immediate payment cleared
6. Submit clearance
Test Data: MAIN_OUT | Payment Type: Immediate only | Orders all cleared
Expected Result: Status changes directly to APPROVED (no approver needed since no credit orders). Security Officer at fromLocation receives notification to confirm Gate OUT.
Comments: If no credit orders → Cashier clearance alone moves pass to APPROVED.

Test Case Description: Cashier Clears Immediate – Credit Orders Still Pending Approver
Screen: Cashier Review screen / Approver screen
Pre-conditions: Cashier logged in. MAIN_OUT has mixed payment: immediate + credit orders.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Cashier
2. Clear immediate payment orders
3. Note status remains in CASHIER_REVIEW
4. Switch to Approver login
5. Check Approver queue
Expected Result: After Cashier clears immediate: status stays in CASHIER_REVIEW. Notification sent to Approver to approve credit portion. Both must complete before status becomes APPROVED.
Comments: Parallel approval: Cashier + Approver must both complete for MAIN_OUT to reach APPROVED.

Test Case Description: Approver Reviews and Approves Credit Portion of MAIN_OUT
Scenario: Happy Path – Approver approves credit orders
Screen: Approvals screen
Pre-conditions: Approver logged in. MAIN_OUT in CASHIER_REVIEW status has credit orders pending.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Approver
2. Navigate to Pending Approvals
3. Locate MAIN_OUT pass
4. Review credit order details
5. Click Approve credit
Test Data: MAIN_OUT | Credit orders pending | Cashier has NOT yet cleared immediate
Expected Result: Credit portion marked as approved. If Cashier has also cleared immediate → status changes to APPROVED. If Cashier not done → remains in CASHIER_REVIEW.

Test Case Description: Approver Rejects Credit Portion of MAIN_OUT
Screen: Approvals screen
Pre-conditions: Approver logged in. MAIN_OUT in CASHIER_REVIEW with credit orders.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Approver
2. Find MAIN_OUT in pending approvals
3. Click Reject
4. Enter rejection reason
5. Confirm rejection
Expected Result: MAIN_OUT status changes to REJECTED. Initiator receives notification with rejection reason.

Test Case Description: Security Gate OUT – MAIN_OUT Appears After Full Approval
Scenario: Happy Path – Security sees MAIN_OUT ready for Gate OUT
Screen: Gate IN / OUT > Gate OUT Panel
Pre-conditions: Security Officer at service plant logged in. MAIN_OUT status is APPROVED (both Cashier + Approver completed).
Test Steps:
1. Login as Security One (Colombo TATA)
2. Navigate to Gate IN / OUT
3. Check Gate OUT queue
Test Data: MAIN_OUT status: APPROVED | fromLocation: Colombo TATA - Altair Showroom
Expected Result: MAIN_OUT appears in Security's Gate OUT queue. Card shows vehicle number, GP number, payment type confirmation, pass sub-type: MAIN OUT.

Test Case Description: Security Gate OUT – Confirm MAIN_OUT Vehicle Departure
Screen: Gate IN / OUT > Gate OUT Panel
Pre-conditions: MAIN_OUT in Security's Gate OUT queue.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Security Officer
2. Locate MAIN_OUT in Gate OUT queue
3. Verify vehicle details
4. Slide to confirm Gate OUT
Expected Result: Status changes to COMPLETED. Pass removed from Gate OUT queue. RECIPIENT users receive notification. Initiator notified of final Gate OUT confirmation. Gate pass journey shown as complete.
Comments: MAIN_OUT COMPLETED = full After Sales cycle done. MAIN_IN remains open in journey view until MAIN_OUT COMPLETED.

Test Case Description: MAIN_IN Journey Open Until MAIN_OUT Completed
Screen: My Gate Passes > Service/Repair
Pre-conditions: MAIN_IN exists. Multiple sub-passes created and completed. MAIN_OUT just confirmed COMPLETED.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to My Gate Passes > Service/Repair
2. Find the vehicle's journey card before MAIN_OUT
3. Confirm MAIN_OUT
4. Refresh My Gate Passes
Test Data: Full journey: MAIN_IN → SUB_OUT → Security Gate IN → MAIN_OUT
Expected Result: Before MAIN_OUT: MAIN_IN card status still shows as active with sub-steps. After MAIN_OUT COMPLETED: journey card shows "Journey Complete". All steps shown as done in the timeline.

Test Case Description: Real-Time Notification – Source Security Notified on SUB_OUT Creation
Screen: Notification Bell / Gate IN OUT page
Pre-conditions: SUB_OUT pass created by Initiator.
Test Steps:
1. Initiator creates SUB_OUT (fromLocation = Colombo TATA)
2. Within 8 seconds check Security One's notification bell and Gate OUT queue
Test Data: SUB_OUT newly created | fromLocation: Colombo TATA
Expected Result: Security One receives notification: "Sub OUT Ready – Confirm Gate Release". Pass appears in Gate OUT queue.

Test Case Description: Real-Time Notification – Destination Security + Initiator Notified After Gate OUT
Screen: Notification Bell / Gate IN queue / Vehicle Arrivals
Pre-conditions: Source Security confirms Gate OUT. Destination Security Two and Initiator Two are logged in (Kandy Branch).
Test Steps:
1. Source Security confirms Gate OUT on SUB_OUT
2. Within 8 seconds check Security Two's Gate IN queue
3. Check Initiator Two's Vehicle Arrivals page
4. Check both notification bells
Test Data: Gate OUT confirmed | toLocation: Kandy Branch - Vehicle Park-1
Expected Result: Both Security Two and Initiator Two receive notifications simultaneously (within 8–10 second poll cycle). Pass appears in Security Two's Gate IN queue. Pass appears in Initiator Two's Vehicle Arrivals Pending tab.
Comments: Core user requirement: ""same time it comes to both Initiator Two and Security Two"".

Test Case Description: Real-Time Notification – Initiator Auto-Refresh After Security Gate IN
Screen: Vehicle Arrivals (receive page)
Pre-conditions: Destination Initiator Two logged in on Vehicle Arrivals page. Destination Security confirms Gate IN.
Test Steps:
1. Initiator Two on Vehicle Arrivals page (do not manually refresh)
2. Destination Security confirms Gate IN
3. Wait up to 10 seconds
Expected Result: Vehicle Arrivals page auto-refreshes without manual action. Pass moves from Pending Arrivals to Recently Confirmed tab. Badge shows "Security Gate IN ✓".

Test Case Description: GP Number – SUB_OUT Displayed with Parent MAIN_IN Number on Security Gate Page
Screen: Gate IN / OUT > Gate OUT/IN card
Pre-conditions: SUB_OUT pass exists.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Source Security One
2. Navigate to Gate OUT queue
3. Find SUB_OUT card
4. Read GP number on badge
Test Data: SUB_OUT | parentPass.gatePassNumber: GP-0214 | own gatePassNumber: GP-0215
Expected Result: Gate card badge displays parent GP number (GP-0214), not the SUB_OUT's own internal GP number.

Test Case Description: GP Number – Journey Timeline in My Gate Passes Shows Single GP Number
Screen: My Gate Passes > Service/Repair > Expanded journey
Pre-conditions: Multiple sub-passes created under one MAIN_IN.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Initiator
2. Navigate to My Gate Passes > Service/Repair
3. Expand journey card
4. View each step in the timeline
Test Data: MAIN_IN: GP-0214 | SUB_OUT, SUB_IN, MAIN_OUT all created
Expected Result: All steps in journey timeline show the parent GP number (GP-0214). No different GP numbers visible per sub-pass step.

Test Case Description: Role Restriction – Non-Initiator Cannot Create After Sales Pass
Screen: Create Gate Pass
Pre-conditions: Logged in as Security Officer or Approver.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Security Officer
2. Navigate to Create Gate Pass
3. Attempt to create an After Sales pass
Expected Result: System denies creation. Either the Create Gate Pass page is inaccessible from Security Officer's navigation, or submission returns a 403 error.

Test Case Description: Role Restriction – Initiator Cannot Confirm Security Gate IN/OUT for SUB_OUT
Screen: My Gate Passes
Pre-conditions: Initiator logged in. SUB_OUT in GATE_OUT status.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Initiator
2. Navigate to My Gate Passes > Service/Repair
3. Locate SUB_OUT in journey card or list
4. Check if confirm/gate-in button is visible for AFTER_SALES SUB_OUT
Expected Result: No "Confirm" or "Gate IN" button shown for AFTER_SALES SUB_OUT passes. Message "Awaiting Security Gate IN" displayed instead.
Comments: User requirement: ""No need this confirm button"" for SUB_OUT.

Test Case Description: Role Restriction – Cashier Cannot Access Gate IN / OUT Operations
Screen: Gate IN / OUT page
Pre-conditions: Cashier logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Cashier
2. Attempt to navigate to Gate IN / OUT page
Expected Result: Gate IN / OUT page is not in Cashier's navigation. Direct URL access redirects to appropriate dashboard or shows access denied.

Test Case Description: Security Location Scoping – Security Officer Sees Only Their Plant's Passes
Screen: Gate IN / OUT
Pre-conditions: Both Security One (Colombo) and Security Two (Kandy) logged in separately. Multiple passes exist for both locations.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Security One (Colombo TATA - Altair Showroom)
2. Check Gate IN and Gate OUT queues
3. Logout
4. Login as Security Two (Kandy Branch - Vehicle Park-1)
5. Check Gate IN and Gate OUT queues
Test Data: Passes at Colombo: 3 | Passes at Kandy: 2
Expected Result: Security One sees only Colombo passes. Security Two sees only Kandy passes. No cross-location data leakage.
Comments: Server-side filtering by fromLocation (Gate OUT) and toLocation (Gate IN).

Test Case Description: Security Location Scoping – Null defaultLocation Falls Back to Show All
Screen: Gate IN / OUT
Pre-conditions: Security Officer user created WITHOUT a defaultLocation assigned.
Test Steps:
1. Login as a Security Officer with no defaultLocation set
2. Navigate to Gate IN / OUT
Expected Result: All passes shown (no location filter applied). Header shows generic label instead of specific gate name.
Comments: Admin must ensure defaultLocation is set for all Security Officers.

Test Case Description: Session Stale – Re-login Refreshes Location and Role After Data Changes
Screen: Login page
Pre-conditions: User was logged in before a DB re-seed or role/location change. Sees wrong data or 0 records.
Test Steps:
1. Admin updates user's defaultLocation in DB
2. User refreshes page – still sees old data
3. User clicks Sign Out
4. User logs back in
Test Data: defaultLocation changed from Colombo to Kandy
Expected Result: After re-login JWT is refreshed. New defaultLocation used. User sees correct location-scoped data.
Comments: JWT is set at sign-in time only. Location changes require re-login to take effect.

Test Case Description: Print Gate Pass – After Sales MAIN_IN
Screen: Gate Pass Detail page
Pre-conditions: MAIN_IN pass in APPROVED or COMPLETED status.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to My Gate Passes
2. Find MAIN_IN pass
3. Click Print icon
4. Verify print preview / PDF
Expected Result: Print preview opens showing correct GP number (parent), vehicle details, locations, service job types, status, printed timestamp.

Test Case Description: Print Gate Pass – Unavailable for PENDING_APPROVAL Status
Screen: My Gate Passes / Gate Pass Detail
Pre-conditions: Pass in PENDING_APPROVAL status.
Test Steps:
1. Find a pass in PENDING_APPROVAL status
2. Hover over / click Print icon
Expected Result: Print icon is disabled (greyed out). Tooltip or indicator shows "Available after approval".
Comments: Print only enabled for APPROVED / GATE_OUT / COMPLETED statuses.
